denominator_note: The 32 nodes are the Minimal Quantum DAG constructed for THIS closure exercise (ROOT_DAG_MASTER.md, matching quantum_closure_v0_1.py's hard-coded counts exactly). Percentages below are of THIS 32-node DAG only -- not of 'all of quantum mechanics', not of 'all textbook QM formulas', and not a claim about coverage of the real theory. Q-M1 (memory-before-mass, formal) is cited support for Q-Y5 and is NOT a 33rd counted node.

status_taxonomy.green: Coq/formal closed -- compiled clean (coqc -q -R . DQG) and axiom-grep clean (no Admitted/admit/Axiom/Parameter), OR an exact-rational finite witness in quantum_closure_v0_1.py with BOTH a passing and a failing control.
status_taxonomy.yellow: theorem/witness closed but the physical/semantic bridge is partial -- FORMAL-CLOSED / BRIDGE-PARTIAL. Never promoted to green.
status_taxonomy.red: open -- no closing witness/gate exists yet, or only a boundary/consistency guard exists (not a root derivation).
status_taxonomy.gray: measured/calibration adapter. None active in this domain yet (no node uses this status).

root_and_spine.node: Q-R2 discrete ticks / finite causal graph

root_and_spine.note: exact rational witness with passing (disc<0 oscillatory) AND failing (disc>0 overdamped) controls; oscillation itself is NOT claimed quantum here

seed_torsion.node: Q-S2 seed torsion = SkewOff, group + rank-N

complexification_norm_evolution.note: exact witness J^2=-I, G-skew; FAILING control J_bad=I refused -- single closed-pair only, general case is Q-X1 (red)

metric_curvature.note: Th_coqc, folded from relativity/OB-03,OB-04 -- same underlying L_R operator, not re-derived

yellow_bridges.note: compiles axiom-free but INHERITS imported Minkowski signature from relativity's refused InfoLorentzInvariance.v -- bounded algebraic identity only, never a root-native QM/SR derivation
green compile (spine's own lambda_c), but the bridge to 'this regime IS quantum' is not established; distinct object from relativity's node-8 lapse/redshift
declared, not derived -- parallel to relativity's OC-01
Q-G1 is green as geometry; bridge into a quantum-regime interpretation is not established
Q-M1 formal algebra is green; the mass semantic identification is declared, not derived -- parallel to relativity's OC-02
formal target definition exists; bridge FROM Q-N2's reversible evolution TO a general CPTP (open-system) map is OPEN -- both controls TBD, never claimed closed

red_open.node: Q-X2 quantum quotient q_Q (commuting square not proven)
red_open.note: central open bottleneck -- most downstream red nodes depend on this
TARGET only; QG-10 gives finite-diagnostic evidence FOR the quadratic form on ONE refinement, not a uniqueness proof
RDL_Heisenberg-shaped formal guard SURVIVED the hollow-card audit as a boundary check, but is not a root-derivation
formal guard exists as a boundary check, not a root derivation; depends on still-open Q-X4
fully open; Q-S1..S3's torsion branch is explicitly NOT spin
needs q_Q + relativity's q_g + a geometry q_geometry jointly, none complete
only a narrow fixed-pair witness exists; general superposition principle is open

rescore_note: This is a conservative honest re-score, UP from the founder's first-pass 10/32=31.25% baseline, because the causal-quantum-gravity Coq-green nodes (Q-R3 forced-L_R, Q-S1..S3 seed trifurcation/torsion, Q-G1 metric/curvature chain) were undercounted in the first pass. Born/measurement/spin/composition/QFT (Q-X6, Q-X7, Q-X11, Q-X2/X3/X4, Q-X12) stay RED throughout -- they were NOT used to inflate the score, and no yellow node was silently promoted to green to reach this number.
remaining_red: Q-X2 quantum quotient q_Q (commuting square not proven)
